prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid billet wheel) paired with a **Pankl Racing Systems** titanium turbine housing to optimize spool on the **M840T** 1.6L V6 hybrid twin-turbo engine, targeting 850+ hp at 1.5 bar boost with **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management for precise fuel and ignition mapping

Install **AP Racing CP9460-1000** 6-piston monoblock calipers with **Brembo HTC 64T** 390mm carbon-ceramic rotors (Formula 1-spec) and **Ferodo DS3000** pads for 30% improved fade resistance under 200°C track conditions, paired with **Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines** for pedal firmness

Replace the OEM **M840T** connecting rods with **Carrillo H-beam forged rods** (ARP2000 bolts) and **JE Pistons 2618-T6 forged slugs** (9.0:1 compression) with **Total Seal APX** gapless rings, supported by a **Dry Sump Systems** 8-stage scavenging system to eliminate oil starvation in 4G lateral loads
estetica: **Vorsteiner MCL35M-specific** carbon fiber front splitter with integrated **DTM-style dive planes** (3D-scanned for MCL35M aero balance) and **Gurney flaps** for 18% more front downforce at 250 km/h, paired with a **Rocket Bunny V3** rear diffuser (CFRP) with active **McLaren F1-style** central strake

**OMP Carbon Fiber Steering Wheel (MCL35M-spec)** with **Alcantara suede grip** and **Motec C127 dash display** integration, replacing the OEM wheel for 1.2 kg weight savings and **Sabelt 6-point harness** (FIA 8862-2009) for driver restraint under 3G braking

**3M 1080 Gloss Black Vinyl Wrap** with **McLaren Papaya Spark** (custom Pantone-matched) **hexagonal pixel camouflage** overlay on the **carbon fiber monocoque**, paired with **HRE FF01** 19x12 front / 20x13 rear forged wheels (ET35/ET40) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** (305/660R19, 325/705R20) semi-slick tires
